title: baccaurea polyneura
intro: Baccaurea polyneura, also known as the 'Many-nerved Baccaurea', is a type of plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Baccaurea polyneura include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat gastrointestinal problems. The plant is often prepared as an infusion or decoction, and its herbal preparations can also be used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
